signals.npcLine: Market pulse downshifted—shadows thicker in crypto alleys.
signals.questPulse: Scout for falling neon coins; fear feeds the streets.
signals.worldFeed: Digital assets flicker; mass selloffs whisper rebellion.
signals.clueEvent: Glitched ledger shows dips amid rising dread index.

signals.npcLine: RAVE static lost in vaporwaves; signals weak but rising.
signals.questPulse: Hunt for RAVE nodes before silence consumes them.
signals.worldFeed: Unknown broadcast spikes lure data scavengers; caution advised.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted chatter hints at shifts in RAVE network.

signals.npcLine: MAGA circuits flicker, instability brewing beneath surface code.
signals.questPulse: Decode MAGA’s strange logic loops; anomalies brewing in code.
signals.worldFeed: Sentiment weakens; fear ripples through digital veins.
signals.clueEvent: Tracebacks reveal odd MAGA protocol spikes at midnight.

signals.npcLine: ASTEROID cluster drifts erratic; miners report shifting data masses.
signals.questPulse: Harvest unstable ASTEROID fragments before collapse.
signals.worldFeed: Shadow markets trade in volatile cosmic bytes.
signals.clueEvent: Market nodes near ASTEROID fracture points twitch erratically.

signals.npcLine: CHIP units heating; whispers of a price crash imminent.
signals.questPulse: Infiltrate CHIP vaults and extract critical data cores.
signals.worldFeed: Thermal spikes in CHIP circuits alarm net-runners worldwide.
signals.clueEvent: Circuit anomalies predict market turbulence with CHIP tokens.
